{{Infobox group
| name = Abidan Court
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Abidan Court Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Abidan]] [[Court]] is an expansive organization dedicated to maintaining order among the worlds and protecting them from chaos. Originating from the world of [[Cradle]], where the first generation of the [[Court of Seven]] ascended, the organization oversees numerous sectors and maintains several core worlds, including [[Sanctum]], [[Haven]], and [[Asylum]]. Their primary mission involves protecting important iterations, collecting and quarantining worlds during system collapses, and managing the stability of the [[Way]]. While they act as guardians against corruption and chaos, they are often viewed by others as inflexible tyrants or jailers. The [[Court]] is led by seven [[Judges]], including figures such as [[Ozriel]], [[Makiel]], and [[Suriel]]. These high-ranking officials possess immense power, capable of eliminating entire populations or rebuilding continents. Their authority is supported by specialized roles, such as the Sixth [[Judge]]'s ability to heal and reconstruct shattered worlds, and various executors. The [[Abidan]] maintain strict regulations regarding the manipulation of [[fate]] and the use of outside power, often intervening in mortal affairs only during dire circumstances. To sustain their ranks, they conduct recruitment drives across different worlds, seeking individuals who have ascended through their own strength. Despite their vast resources—including powerful artifacts like the [[Razor]] and Worldseeds—the [[Court]] faces significant threats from enemies like the [[Vroshir]] and former members such as [[the Mad King]], [[Daruman]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Abidan Court]] operates in the name of order among the worlds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] is the Sixth [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel]] is a member of the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Schisms occur within the [[Court of Seven]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Abidan Court]] is a group that includes [[Judges]] like [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Abidan Court]] only has three Worldseeds.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Abidan Court]] is where the [[Judges]] are located.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Abidan Court]] consists of seven [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]] will be tried in the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
